summary: ANDROID 🟥 Correct Firmware version for Charge Case but Update available on Software tab after DFU
scenario: DFU update button remains available after successful Charge Case firmware update on Voyager Legend 50, causing immediate failure on re-tap until app restart
description_clean: After performing a DFU (Device Firmware Update) on the Charge Case for Voyager Legend 50, the correct firmware version is displayed on the Software tab, but the "Update" button remains available showing the same build number. Tapping the Update button again causes the DFU to fail immediately. The issue is resolved after restarting the app, which then shows the proper firmware version.
